## Checklist

- [ ] Focused change — no unrelated refactors
- [ ] Tested locally (`npm ci`, `npm run lint`, `npm run test`, `npm run build` as applicable)
- [ ] i18n strings added to `src/core/i18n.js` (en + ru) if user-facing text changed
- [ ] Plugin / registry changes coordinated with [cultiva-plugins](https://github.com/krwg/cultiva-plugins) if needed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated for user-visible changes (1.7.x section)
- [ ] Screenshots / GIF attached for UI changes (optional but helpful)
